Title: Former Somali PM slams appointment of interim Southwest state leader
Description: Mogadishu (HOL) — Former Somali Prime Minister Omar Abdirashid Ali Sharmarke has criticized the federal government’s appointment of an interim leader for Southwest State, describing the decision as unconstitutional and a direct challenge to Somalia’s federal framework.
